mapper.sql: id, pco_id, pco_item, pco_type, use_qty, out_qty, inventory_id, inventory_table_type, src_inventory_id, src_inventory_table_type, sortnum, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_pco_item_inventory
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_pco_item_inventory (id, pco_id, pco_item, pco_type, use_qty, out_qty, inventory_id, inventory_table_type, src_inventory_id, src_inventory_table_type, sortnum, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{srcInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{srcInventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

update dbo.ops_pco_item_inventory

pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_type = #{record.pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER},

src_inventory_table_type = #{record.srcInventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_item = #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_type = #{pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER},

creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
